result: If I could change the world in a single stroke, I’d eliminate extreme poverty—so that every person has reliable access to clean water, nutritious food, basic health care, and the opportunity for education.  It’s a simple, concrete goal that would ripple into countless other improvements: better health, greater stability, more equitable opportunity, and a richer, more compassionate world for everyone.
